transcript: Speaker A (AI): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): I sleeping. Speaker A (AI): I'm sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಫಾರ್ಮಲ್ ಆಗಿ I'm getting some sleep ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say "I'm sleeping". Formally, you can also say "I'm getting some sleep".] Speaker B (Human): ಓ ಹೌದಾ? ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really? How to learn English?] Speaker A (AI): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily. You can learn English in one month.] Speaker B (Human): ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?] Speaker A (AI): ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾಯಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just one rupee. Over 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B (Human): ಸೂಪರ್, ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?] Speaker A (AI): ಈಗಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ [What are you doing] I SLEEPING I'M GETTING SOME SLEEP 15 Minutes DAILY PRACTICE 1 Month ENGLISH 1 Rupee Only 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE MySivi AI English Speaking App Install Now
summary: An AI robot corrects a man's English grammar in a split-screen layout. The AI explains how users can practice English daily for 15 minutes using the MySivi app for just 1 Rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
